nuggets.idea_one_liner: Obsessive thoughts aren't the problem; they are the symptom of an underlying source error.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Offers relief by redirecting focus from the impossible task of 'not thinking' to the tangible task of 'source building.'

value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Clear pivot from symptom to cause
denominator_notes: Requires willingness to ignore the thoughts

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: I'm saying that the thoughts actually aren't the problem... the thoughts are the symptom of the problem... problem is still pouring out the symptom.
proof_anchor_lines: Thoughts are symptoms of a deeper source error
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: You are fighting a ghost while the real enemy is walkng into your back door.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: Stop being the man who argues with his own symptoms.
nuggets.hook_angle_3_mechanism: The shift from thought-control to source-focus.
nuggets.enemy_frame_proof_redacted: You've been trying to stop the symptom, which means that the problem is still pouring out the symptom.
nuggets.first_step_seed: Next time the thought comes, don't argue with it. Label it: 'Symptom.' Then move your focus to praising God immediately.
